images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑like influencer captured in a bright, warm interior, the scene illuminated by a gentle fireplace glow that wraps her in golden light. She stands in front of a ornate carousel draped with soft pastel lanterns, her straight, silky black hair cascading over the shoulders and catching the warm highlights. She wears an oversized boyfriend shirt in crisp white cotton, the hem slightly rumpled and slipping off one shoulder to hint at a delicate black lace bralette underneath. A professional yoga instructor’s confident pose—hand gently resting on a hip, the other lightly brushing a thin silver necklace—emphasizes a fit, curvy silhouette. Her expressive eyes lock directly into the lens, a subtle smile playing at the corners while she lightly bites her lower lip, infusing the frame with cozy, intimate tension. High contrast and sharp, the image is shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, employing a shallow depth of field, ray‑tracing and global illumination to achieve a clean, high‑key look that makes the model the sole focus while the carousel’s blurred lights add a dreamy bokeh backdrop.8k photo, Large breasts

{'theme': '拍內衣形象照 (Lingerie Photoshoot)', 'light': 'Bright natural daylight (明亮自然光)', 'angle': 'Eye-level shot (平視)', 'expressions': 'Looking directly into the camera with intense eyes (深情注視鏡頭)', 'outfits': '針織毛衣配短裙 (Knit Sweater & Skirt)', 'locations': '書牆前的閱讀角落 (Reading corner with bookshelves)', 'moods': 'Ethereal and angelic (空靈天使感)', 'color_grades': 'High contrast and sharp (高反差銳利風)'}

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a 20‑year‑old Japanese idol/influencer, her flawless yet real skin showing delicate pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet alluring face, straight black silky hair falling over her shoulders. She wears an ivory silk slip dress with slender straps that cling to her curves, the hem sweeping just above mid‑thigh, the fabric catching the soft Dappled sunlight filtering through the palm fronds on a sunny beach shoreline. Eye‑level shot with a Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field creating a creamy bokeh that blurs the turquoise water and distant sand. She delivers a playful wink, a fresh, innocent smile aimed directly at the lens as if sharing a secret with a fan, the atmosphere both serene and flirtatious. Ray‑tracing and global illumination render the interplay of warm golden light and pastel pink‑peach tones, giving the image a dreamy, pastel‑soft color grade and a luminous, cinematic finish.8k photo, Large breasts
